name: 15q13_3_BP4_BP5_LCR
description: 15q13.3 BP4 and BP5 LCRs (LCR15s) detail. Each ~250 kb SD block at >99% identity composed of GOLGA8 (GOLGA8I, GOLGA8O, GOLGA8R), CHRFAM7A (CHRNA7-FAM7A hybrid paralog), ARHGAP11B paralogs, and TRPM1 flanking element. Mediates the recurrent ~1.5 Mb 15q13.3 microdeletion encompassing CHRNA7. Documented at coarser level in 15q13_3_CHRNA7.json; this entry zooms on the LCR cassette anatomy.

architecture.internal_structure: BP4 = GOLGA8R/GOLGA8O + CHRFAM7A; BP5 = GOLGA8I + CHRFAM7A duplicate; ARHGAP11B paralog cassette embedded; TRPM1 unique distal.
